title: Better Fire 32x
description: Changes fire to better less obtrusive model and textures and large smoke particles to be less annoying. And lowers fire overlay. Great QOL for many things like PVP/PVE
body:
This pack was made to make fire and the big smoke particles less annoying and in the way.

This was done for great QOL to do the Psycho Bandit boss on the ventureland minecraft server.

However it will prob also just be a great addition for those who want a different fire or even better fire for those who pvp but want a different fire pack.

unlike most fire packs that just cut the texture i squished each frame to make the fire look nicer
